meaning: Mark/point identifier from device export.
Final captured ECEF coordinate from RTK device.
Receiver-estimated per-point horizontal standard deviation (sigma). The universal anchor indicator. Exported by all RTK devices in principle; may be absent in restricted export configs.
Receiver-estimated per-point vertical standard deviation.
Solution status at capture moment: FIXED / FLOAT / AUTONOMOUS. Hard-gates per-point completeness if FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS.
Age of the RTK correction stream at the capture moment. May be missing on some third-party exports (Trimble JXL / Emlid CSV).
How long the rover held FIXED before this capture. CB_X full; Trimble/Emlid partial; OTHER often N/A.
Position dilution of precision at the capture epoch.
Tracked satellite count at the capture epoch.
Mean carrier-to-noise density across tracked satellites at capture.
Antenna model as configured/auto-detected by the rover.
Device serial / ID from the rover.
Logged tilt angle at capture (tilt-compensated rovers only — CB_X, Trimble R12+, Emlid RS3+). N/A for older devices.
UTC timestamp of the capture moment.
RTK device firmware version.
True once the device session has been downloaded/synced from the rover.
Signature validation result. CB_X expected; Trimble partial; Emlid/OTHER typically N/A.
True if session was closed deliberately (not via crash/power loss).
Device-reported session end (UTC). Cross-check against capture timestamps.
Enum: CB_X / AEROPOINT / DGPS / OTHER. Drives oplog branching, antenna-height auto-fill, and indicator data-availability logic.
Operator-entered device ID. Cross-checked vs RTK device-reported device_id.
Locked to CHECK_POINT for this score. GCP-role points are excluded (covered by gcp_score).
Operator-selected antenna model. Cross-checked vs RTK device antenna_type.
Operator-entered antenna height. CB_X / AEROPOINT: factory-known and auto-filled (indicator = 100). DGPS / OTHER: operator-measured.
Explicit units (m/ft).
VERTICAL or SLANT. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
ARP / SLANT_MARK / MOUNT_BOTTOM / OTHER. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
Number of independent height measurements. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
Boolean — operator-declarative. ADVISORY only on non-tilt-comp devices (cannot be verified). On tilt-comp devices, replaced by logged tilt_logged_deg which IS verifiable.
Distance from rover to base/CORS at capture time. Critical for India where CORS coverage is patchy.
NTRIP mountpoint operator was connected to.
Project-declared expected mountpoint. Cross-check against actual.
Survey accuracy target (e.g. 0.02 m for cm-grade work). σ thresholds expressed as multiples of this target.
Mark physical type (printed_paper / painted / cb_x_surface / aeropoint_surface / dgps_peg / other).
Operator confirmation that the mark was intact at capture. ADVISORY only — not scored.
Boolean — was a photo of the mark taken. ADVISORY flag CP_NO_MARK_PHOTO if False.
Drone flight start (UTC) from upload bundle. Used to compute capture-to-flight delay.
Drone flight end (UTC) from upload bundle.
